zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana la Zouche於1314年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，她的父親Eudes la Zouche17歲，母親Joan Inge16歲。她於大約1334年與Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight在英國哈普爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1359年在英國史洛普爾哈德利享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana la Zouche于1314年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，她的父亲Eudes la Zouche17岁，母亲Joan Inge16岁。她于大约1334年与Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight在英国哈普爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1359年在英国史洛普爾哈德利享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Chantal, Dominique, Francois, Herve, Michel, Rodolphe, Serge.
French (Fouché): variant of Foucher . Compare Fooshee , Foshee , Fouch , and Foushee .
Altered form (Fouché) of French Foucher (compare 1 above), found mainly in South Africa.

variants.name: Foucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Etienne, Henri, Lydie, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Folchari, composed of the elements folk, folc ‘people’ and hari ‘army’. Compare Faucher 2.

variants.name: Foushee
meanings: History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its original form Fouché) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Fouch
meanings: Altered form of   Fouts  , a surname of German origin.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Fudge  .

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana la Zouche was born in 1314, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Eudes la Zouche, was 17 and her mother, Joan Inge, was 16. She married Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight about 1334, in Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1359, in Hadley, Shropshire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana la Zouche est née en 1314, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Eudes la Zouche, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Joan Inge, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight environ 1334, à Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1359, à Hadley, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

Sie hat um 1334 in Hampshire, England Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: Juliana la Zoucheが1314年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父Eudes la Zoucheは17歳，母Joan Ingeは16歳であった。約1334年にイギリスハンプシュアイアでSir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1359年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアハドリーで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana la Zouche(이)가 1314년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes la Zouche(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Inge(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1334년 영국 함프실르에서 Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 영국 슈럽실르 하들리에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana la Zouche nasceu em 1314, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eudes la Zouche, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Joan Inge, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight aproximadamente 1334, em Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1359, em Hadley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana la Zouche родилась в 1314 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Eudes la Zouche было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Inge, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight около 1334 г. в местности хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1359 г. в местности хадли, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

Se casó con Sir Robert de Pembridge of Tong, Knight aproximadamente 1334, en Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1359, en Hadley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
